scripts.build:web: node scripts/generate-logos-manifest.mjs && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html bingo-courses.js sw.js firebase-messaging-sw.js manifest.webmanifest offline.html privacy.html support.html 404.html favicon.svg icon.svg icon-maskable.svg icon-192.png icon-512.png icon-maskable-512.png apple-touch-icon.png dist/ && cp -R assets dist/assets && cp -R brand dist/brand && (test -d .well-known && cp -R .well-known dist/.well-known || true) && echo '✓ web bundle written to dist/'
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
